adjudication_notes: Contract current_pack advanced CP00-137->CP00-138 (Risk A, unit_count 10, range RP03.P02.M09.S03-RP03.P02.M09.S12, next CP00-139/RP03.P02.M09.S13, flag audit_compliance_claude_packet_sensitive_boundary_verified); schema_version v0.4->v0.5 and validator string updated to match.

All new catalog functions return frozen reference-only descriptors; no runtime tenant/matter/permission/audit-hint checks, no audit append/write/mutate/delete/query/export/admin-review, no idempotency/hash-chain/retention persistence, no lock acquisition or token persistence, no rollback/retry, no UI render, no Hermes runtime write, no Claude prompt send or execution. no_write_attestation and per-case freezeNoWriteResult flags all false; Claude packet read_only true with executes_review/sends_claude_prompt false.

hidden_source_fields is a name-only denylist (incl. cross_tenant_row_count, unauthorized_object_name, secrets/tokens); no actual sensitive values, counts, or object names exposed. Result objects set unauthorized_count_exposed, unauthorized_object_name_exposed, hidden_field_names_exposed all false; query count_leakage_prohibited retained.
implements_ldip false and splits_hrx_product false; HRX remains embedded and LDIP not implemented. H03/C03 bound as evidence/review gates only, not product authorities.

CP00-135/136/137 contract sections, validator checks, test cases, and index exports are preserved (only additive changes); current_pack advances to CP138 without dropping prior history. Coverage validator, catalog (10 rows), deliverable distribution (6 impl/2 security_audit/2 ui), first S03/last S12, and CP139 handoff all align with facts.

Observation (not a finding): docs/closeout-pack-plan/closeout-pack-plan.json CP00-138 entry and docs/closeout-packs/cp00-138/manifest.json are referenced by the test/validator but not part of this staged diff; both fall back gracefully, yet the plan must already enumerate CP00-138 (S03-S12 in order) for green validation.
